other_observers: Katrina Vowels, Sandra Winkler, John Shenot; yes
description: Very small gull (smaller than accompanying Bonaparte's Gull) with thin black bill, white head with small black auricular spot, and black patch on crown, with gray nape. Underparts completely white, including underwings. Saddle pale gray. Tail mostly white with black terminal band observed in flight. Wings with heavy black markings, forming the letter "M" when spread, and white trailing edge (seen in flight).Behaviors: Flying over lake (hunting), and sitting on lake surface.Call: nonePlumage: juvenal/first basic
photographer: Photographer: N Komar, N Komar, N Komar
